form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on March 8 over 1609m, 2 len behind Ah Ca Ira with 56kg at $1.65. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at this track on February 15 over 1609m, 0.3 len behind Kyle's Mom carrying 56kg at $2.76. Impressed last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a 0.1 len at this track February 19 over 1408m defeating Spirit Of Esther carrying 56kg at $10.72. Second-up 5th of 7 at this track on April 2 over 1609m, 8 len behind Heavenly Light carrying 57kg at $21.96. Can improve. Top chance if at her best.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after a year ran last in a small field at Penn National on March 25 over 1207m, 9 len behind Back Forty carrying 54.5kg at $9.10.
